description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:latest Docker image. Add a global before_script that appends fastestmirror settings to /etc/dnf/dnf.conf, installs createrepo_c, curl, git, dpkg-devel, tar, gzip, gnupg2, expect, openssl, reprepro, findutils, and rpm-sign via dnf, and makes updaterepos.sh executable. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs ./updaterepos.sh, creates a .public directory, moves pkgs/* into it, builds a simple HTML index by echoing tags and listing files, then moves .public to public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 1 day. The pages job should only run on the master branch and set the variables ARTIFACT_COMPRESSION_LEVEL=fastest and FF_USE_FASTZIP=true.
